ksa_text: Track compliance remediation activities through closure, monitoring milestones and action completion, escalating blockers, maintaining remediation plans with documented evidence, and ensuring verified closure of findings.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-T-005 (Risk and Compliance) scores 0.427 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Analytics Engineer: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Analytics Engineer.
